sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10278" key="a)ntiparape/mpomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρα-πέμπομαι</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. τῇ μνήμῃ</foreign> <sense id="n10278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be cheered on one's way</tr_> [to death] by the remembrance, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1099d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
